plans.title: Message Window Contract
plans.description: Define the partial transcript response contract and cursor semantics.

tasks.title: T001 Define transcript window response schema
tasks.description: Define messages, paging metadata, anchors, and partial flags.

tasks.title: T002 Define stable cursor format and ordering contract
tasks.description: Use a cursor that remains stable when messages are appended.

tasks.title: T003 Define latest-user-message anchor selection rules
tasks.description: Select the most recent visible user-authored message as the initial anchor.

tasks.title: T004 Define backward compatibility and full-transcript escape hatch
tasks.description: Keep explicit full transcript access for debug/export use.

plans.title: Backend Pagination
plans.description: Add backend support for bounded transcript windows and lightweight summaries.

tasks.title: T005 Add repository/service method for paged messages before cursor
tasks.description: Fetch older messages with a stable before cursor and limit.

tasks.title: T006 Add repository/service method for latest user anchor window
tasks.description: Fetch the latest user-authored message plus all later messages.

tasks.title: T007 Add API request parameters or endpoint for bounded session detail
tasks.description: Expose bounded initial load and older page requests.

tasks.title: T008 Add paging metadata to session detail responses
tasks.description: Return has_older, cursors, anchor id, and partial flags.

tasks.title: T009 Make session list summaries avoid serializing full transcripts
tasks.description: Avoid full message body traversal in chat list responses where possible.

tasks.title: T010 Keep full transcript available for explicit export/debug use
tasks.description: Provide a clearly named full transcript path for workflows that truly need it.

plans.title: Frontend Lazy Thread
plans.description: Load and render chat messages incrementally in Codex Mobile.

tasks.title: T011 Extend Flutter API client and models for message windows
tasks.description: Parse paging metadata and partial transcript fields.

tasks.title: T012 Update chat controller to load initial latest-user exchange
tasks.description: Replace full-session initial load with the anchored window.

tasks.title: T013 Add upward-scroll lazy loading with scroll-position preservation
tasks.description: Prepend older pages without jumping the user's viewport.

tasks.title: T014 Add loading, empty, retry, and exhausted-history UI states
tasks.description: Show clear non-blocking states for older-history loading.

tasks.title: T015 Deduplicate overlapping pages and live appended messages
tasks.description: Avoid duplicates when older pages and new messages arrive concurrently.

tasks.title: T016 Preserve composer and active run updates while older pages load
tasks.description: Keep sending and job status updates responsive during pagination.

plans.title: Active Run And Context
plans.description: Keep active run metadata and message affordances correct with partial transcripts.

tasks.title: T017 Preserve current run/reviewer/job metadata with partial messages
tasks.description: Ensure execution state is not derived only from loaded messages.

tasks.title: T018 Preserve attachment, asset, feedback, and recovery affordances for visible messages
tasks.description: Visible messages keep the same actions and links as before.

tasks.title: T019 Ensure New Project readiness markers and build prompts remain detectable
tasks.description: Do not hide state needed to gate New Project build execution.

tasks.title: T020 Ensure summary/collapse views still work over the loaded window
tasks.description: Collapse modes operate predictably on partial transcript data.

plans.title: Validation And Rollout
plans.description: Validate pagination behavior and deployment safety.

tasks.title: T021 Add backend tests for anchor selection and cursor pagination
tasks.description: Cover latest user anchor, ordering, empty sessions, and older pages.

tasks.title: T022 Add backend tests for session list lightweight behavior
tasks.description: Confirm summaries do not serialize entire transcripts.

tasks.title: T023 Add Flutter model/API tests for paged transcript payloads
tasks.description: Cover parsing and request construction.

tasks.title: T024 Add Flutter widget tests for initial load, scroll-up load, retry, and append behavior
tasks.description: Cover the user-visible lazy loading states.

tasks.title: T025 Add regression tests for active generator/reviewer conversations
tasks.description: Ensure long-running conversations remain observable.

tasks.title: T026 Run full backend and mobile validation before deployment
tasks.description: Run relevant pytest, flutter analyze, and flutter test before release.
